Template Name

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Need-to-Know

This Week’s Focus

Below is a table separating "This Week's Focus" for an accessible view of multiple links.
Read: Insert Quicklink
Do: Insert Quicklink
Submit: Insert Quicklink

Note: Add Quicklinks for direct access to Assignments, Quizzes, Discussions, Chapters, Lectures, etc.

How to add quicklinks.

Step 1: Click on the Quicklink icon on the toolbar.

  • Looks like a chain.

Step 2: Add any materials you would like from your course content.

  • Hint: Click on the table and add columns for more links. Do not add links in the same column next to each other after a comma.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:




              <!DOCTYPE html>
              <html><head><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://s.brightspace.com/lib/fonts/0.6.1/fonts.css"><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://templates.lcs.brightspace.com/lib/assets/css/styles.min.css"></head><body style="color: rgb(32, 33, 34); font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 12px;"><div style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px; background: #ffffff;">
              <div style="font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b7280;">Need-to-Know</div>
              <h2 style="margin: 6px 0 8px 0;">This Week’s Focus</h2>
              <table border="1" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100.032%; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; border: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); height: 134.824px;"><caption>Below is a table separating "This Week's Focus" for an accessible view of multiple links.</caption><colgroup><col style="width: 50.0868%;"><col style="width: 49.9457%;"></colgroup>
              <tbody>
                <tr style="height: 44.9414px;">
                  <th style="border-color: #000000; text-align: center;" scope="row"><strong>Read:</strong></th>
                    <td style="border-color: #000000; text-align: center;"><strong><a href="https://blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Insert Quicklink</a></strong></td>
              </tr>
              <tr style="height: 44.9414px;">
                  <th style="border-color: #000000; text-align: center;" scope="row"><strong>Do:</strong></th>
                    <td style="border-color: #000000; text-align: center;"><strong><a href="https://blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Insert Quicklink</a><br></strong></td>
              </tr>
              <tr style="height: 44.9414px;">
                <th style="border-color: #000000; text-align: center;" scope="row"><strong>Submit:</strong></th>
                  <td style="border-color: #000000; text-align: center;"><strong><a href="https://blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Insert Quicklink</a><br></strong></td>
              </tr>
              </tbody>
              </table>
              <p><em>Note: Add Quicklinks for direct access to Assignments, Quizzes, Discussions, Chapters, Lectures, etc.</em></p>
              <p><em></em></p>
              <h3>How to add quicklinks.</h3>
              <p>Step 1: Click on the Quicklink icon on the toolbar.</p>
              <ul>
                <li>Looks like a chain.</li>
              </ul>
              <p><em></em>Step 2: Add any materials you would like from your course content.</p>
              <ul>
                <li>Hint: Click on the table and add columns for more links. Do not add links in the same column next to each other after a comma.</li>
              </ul>
              </div></body></html>

← Back to catalog
